name: Mary Peltola
stanceSummary: In a joint congressional statement after the October 7 attacks, Peltola condemned Hamas and Palestinian Islamic Jihad violence, backed freezing Iranian assets, and said the U.S. should stand with Israel.

timeline.event: As Blue Dog Coalition co-chair, Peltola joined a statement condemning Hamas attacks, supporting Israel, and calling to freeze $6 billion in Iranian assets.
